data.title: Migrate pre-commit-review-gate.sh to shared library
data.description:
Replace inline MERGE_HEAD detection (~lines 202-233) and REBASE_HEAD detection (~lines 251-295) with source "$HOOK_DIR/lib/merge-state.sh" + ms_filter_to_worktree_only call. Preserve early-exit when all files are incoming-only.

TDD Exemption: Unit exemption #1 — no new conditional logic; substitutive refactor. Existing tests provide regression coverage.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] No inline merge detection in executable lines
  Verify: grep -v '^\s*#' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-review-gate.sh | grep -qE '_merge_head_sha=|_merge_base=\$\(git|_rebase_onto_file=|_rebase_onto=' && exit 1 || true
- [ ] Script sources merge-state.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'source.*merge-state.sh' plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-review-gate.sh
- [ ] Existing review-gate tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-pre-commit-review-gate.sh
